lane_policy.Lane A: UI not wired, no-op, missing handler, or visible false affordance that is a repo/UI implementation issue.
lane_policy.Lane B: API, permission, audit, persistence, fail-closed, native bridge, or runtime proof gap inside the product/runtime boundary.
lane_policy.Lane C: Descriptor-only or unavailable surface that has no runtime/provider/API layer yet.
lane_policy.Lane D: External provider, OS/native delivery, owner approval, public release, notarization, payment, data-cloud, or external receipt gate.
lane_policy.Lane E: Visual, accessibility, focus, mobile overflow, Korean copy, launch-boundary wording, or AI-slop/copy issue.
